tests.unit: tests/test_update_service.py — 16 passed (versions, channel filter, asset selection, sha256/digest reconcile, safe overview)
tests.integration: tests/test_update_integration.py — 6 passed against a local injected feed (discovery, verified download, checksum mismatch blocks + deletes, truncated download blocks, active-job install block, visible /CLOSEAPPLICATIONS flags, portable no-self-replace)

build_gate.result: Release gate OK — validated LecturePack-0.9.0-beta.1-Portable.zip + SHA256SUMS.txt
build_gate.installer_gate_note: Setup.exe gate runs on the full build (CI/ISCC); not built here (no Inno Setup).

packaged_discovery_e2e.method: Launched the freshly-built packaged exe with a test-only injected feed (LECTUREPACK_UPDATE_FEED/_HOSTS) + offscreen; confirmed the packaged process requested /releases off-thread on startup.
packaged_discovery_e2e.proves: Packaged binary reads the injected feed, performs the check off the GUI thread, resolves the %LOCALAPPDATA% update cache, has no source-tree dependency, and does not crash.
packaged_discovery_e2e.not_covered_here: GUI click-through of download->install in the packaged window (human step). Download/verify/handoff/mismatch/portable LOGIC is the same frozen code covered by the integration test.

security_privacy.test_feed_override: env-only (LECTUREPACK_UPDATE_FEED/_HOSTS), not reachable from the production UI; production host+https rules enforced when unset
security_privacy.release_notes: rendered as escaped text only (no HTML/JS execution)
